description: Create a nightly GitHub Actions workflow named nightly-neon that runs on a scheduled cron job and allows manual dispatch. The workflow should set up an ubuntu-latest environment within a kdeneon/plasma:user container, prepare the environment and source code, build the project with custom CMake arguments, archive the build, and upload it as an artifact. Additionally, send a notification on success or failure to a Matrix room if the workflow runs on the calamares/calamares repository.
